---
title: "Now"
subtitle: "What I'm working on this month."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
*Inspired by [Derek Sivers' Now Page Movement](https://nownownow.com/about). Short, current, honest. Updated monthly.*
:::

## May 2026

[Replace this placeholder with 4–6 sentences. Riff on any of these:]

- A paper currently in revision or in review
- A class you're prepping or in the middle of
- A talk you gave or are about to give
- A conference or workshop you're attending
- A book you're reading
- One personal note (cats, video games, fantasy/sci-fi, karaoke)

*Last updated: May 2026.*

---

## Past months

*(Old Now entries will live here once you've written more than one. The current month sits at the top; rolled-over entries get their own subhead — `### April 2026`, etc.)*
